title: Opening for Production Engineer at Apollo Tyres

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Apollo Tyres
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Production Engineer looking for your next big career move? Apollo Tyres in Bengaluru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Apollo Tyres:
Apollo Tyres is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Tyres!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
